letterheads.title: Letterheads
letterheads.empty: No letterheads yet. Create a letterhead to use as a background on documents.

createDialog.title: Create Letterhead
createDialog.description: Upload PDF files for the first page and optionally for continuation pages.
createDialog.firstPageRequired: A PDF file for the first page is required.
createDialog.invalidPdf: Please upload a valid PDF file.
createDialog.invalidPageMargins: Please enter valid non-negative page margins.

editDialog.title: Edit Letterhead
editDialog.description: Change name, description, margins, or replace PDF files.
editDialog.invalidPdf: Please upload a valid PDF file.
editDialog.invalidPageMargins: Please enter valid non-negative page margins.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Letterhead
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete the letterhead "{{name}}"? Documents using this letterhead will be exported without a background.
deleteDialog.notFound: Letterhead not found. It may have already been deleted.
